name: pawpal
description: Installable PawPal pet care app for web, Android, and iOS.

scripts.build:web: mkdir -p dist/assets && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp manifest.webmanifest sw.js dist/ && cp -R assets/icons dist/assets/
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init PawPal com.pawpal.app --web-dir dist
scripts.android:prepare: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync
